statement: In every magma, Equation 3391 (`x * y = z * (x * (w * x))`) implies Equation 4649 (`(x * y) * x = (z * w) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0623
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op x (op w x)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op (op x y) x) = (op (op z w) x)
